steps.title: Track the demand reversal
steps.content: The passage says higher cartridge prices had a counterintuitive effect: instead of discouraging buyers, the rising prices drew more buyers into the market. The blank must describe prices causing or producing demand.

steps.title: Rule out mismatched verbs
steps.content: Choice B means turning something into a source of profit, not causing demand. Choice C means estimating value. Choice D means taking advantage of something. The remaining verb means bringing about or producing, which fits the demand increase. The answer is A.
